autoResolveChallenge(bytes32).details: SEC-001 FIX-001: CEI pattern applied - ALL state updates BEFORE external calls

challenge(bytes32,bytes).details: FIX-012: fraudProofHash now uses SHA3-256 instead of keccak256

returns.isTimedOut: True if 72h has passed since prover was requested
returns.timeRemaining: Seconds remaining until timeout (0 if already timed out)

getEmergencyUnlock(bytes32).details: Sequence #3: View function for emergency state

getUserLockIds(address).details: Returns array of lock IDs where user is the sender

returns.lockIds: Array of lock IDs belonging to the user

initiateEmergencyFromTimeout(bytes32).details: Sequence #3: TRIG-003 - Emergency Path auto switch

params.lockId: The lock ID to switch to emergency path

lock(address,bytes).details: No nonReentrant here since lockWithExpiry has itDEPRECATED: Use lockWithSR0 for SEQUENCES.md compliant flow

lockWithExpiry(address,bytes,uint256).details: FIX-010: dilithiumPubKeyHash now uses SHA3-256 instead of keccak256DEPRECATED: Use lockWithSR0 for SEQUENCES.md compliant flow

lockWithSR0(bytes32,bytes32,address,uint.details: SEQUENCES.md Sequence #1 compliant: L3 computes SR_0, L1 just stores      This eliminates the 15.5M gas cost of SHA3-256 on large Dilithium keys

params.lockId: Lock ID computed by L3 (SHA3-256 of SR_0 + timestamp)
params.recipient: Address to receive funds on unlock
params.sr0: State Root 0 computed by L3 (SHA3-256 of lock params + pk_dilithium)

lockedBalanceOf(address).details: Uses cached userLockedBalance mapping for O(1) lookup

returns._0: Total amount locked by the user (active locks only)

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

recordProverRequest(bytes32).details: Sequence #3: TRIG-002 - Prover response state tracking

registerProver(address,bytes).details: FIX-011: sphincsPubKeyHash now uses SHA3-256 instead of keccak256

registerProverTestnet(address,bytes).details: For internal testing on testnets. Owner-only, no stake required.

params.proverAddress: The address of the prover to register

requestEmergencyUnlock(bytes32,address).details: Sequence #3: TRIG-004 - User manual Emergency option

resolveChallenge(bytes32,bool).details: SEC-001 FIX-002b: CEI pattern applied - ALL state updates BEFORE external calls      Emergency bond processing now occurs BEFORE _resolveValidChallenge() call

setProverRegistry(address).details: v3.0: When set, prover lookups use registry instead of local mapping

submitDefense(bytes32,bytes).details: FIX-013: defenseProofHash now uses SHA3-256 instead of keccak256

transferOwnership(address).details: SEC-002 FIX-005: Added OwnershipTransferred event emission

updateSecurityCouncil(address).details: SEC-002 FIX-006: Added SecurityCouncilUpdated event emission

lock(address,bytes).notice: Lock funds with default expiry (delegates to lockWithExpiry)

lockWithSR0(bytes32,bytes32,address,uint.notice: Lock funds using pre-computed lock_id and sr_0 from L3 Aegis
